---
# https://vitepress.dev/reference/default-theme-home-page
layout: home

hero:
  name: Limit WordPress Concurrent Logins
  text: with Loggedin.
  tagline: Stop account sharing by limiting active logins from multiple devices.
  actions:
    - theme: brand
      text: View Addons
      link: /addons
    - theme: alt
      text: Documentation
      link: /general/installing-plugin
  image:
    src: /icon.svg

features:
  - title: Developer-Friendly
    details: Following WordPress coding standards, you can customize all functionalities using hooks.
